parameters.query:
UPDATE outreach_items
SET status='drafting'
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id FROM outreach_items
  WHERE status='discovered'
  ORDER BY discovered_at
  LIMIT 10
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
)
RETURNING id, source_platform, source_url, source_excerpt, source_author, source_community;

options.system: You output only valid JSON, no surrounding prose.
You output only valid JSON, no surrounding prose.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO drafts (
  outreach_item_id, variant, model_provider, model_name, prompt_version,
  draft_text, suggested_destination, suggested_post_type,
  risk_flags, risk_score, manual_only, content_hash
) VALUES
  ($1,  $2,  'anthropic', 'claude-sonnet-4-6', 'draft-v1', $3,  $4,  $5,  $6::jsonb,  $7,  $8,  $9 ),
  ($10, $11, 'anthropic', 'claude-sonnet-4-6', 'draft-v1', $12, $13, $14, $15::jsonb, $16, $17, $18),
  ($19, $20, 'anthropic', 'claude-sonnet-4-6', 'draft-v1', $21, $22, $23, $24::jsonb, $25, $26, $27)
RETURNING outreach_item_id, variant;
UPDATE outreach_items SET status='drafted' WHERE id = $1;
